title: Vaathkree (species)
content:

The '''Vaathkree''' people evolved on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Vaathkree/Legends|Vaathkree]]. They were covered by armored plates, making them appear to be made from stone and metal. Vaathkree were well-known for their devotion to trade and bartering. In fact, the name of their religion (roughly translated to [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]]) was ''"The Deal."''

==Biology and appearance==
[[File:Vaathkree-AE.png|thumb|left|200px|A Vaathkree]]

Vaathkree had a long lifespan (300 to 350 standard years) and a two-staged life cycle. They began their lives as small, shapeless non-sentients called '''Stonesingers'''. Stonesingers roamed the lava flats of Vaathkree, incorporating bits of stone and metal into their body structure. Their metabolism allowed them to absorb minerals which would be turned into tough armor scales on the outside of the skin. At about nine years of age, the Stonesingers were about one meter tall, but still had a fluid form. They also began to develop rudimentary intelligence, and were instructed by adult Vaathkree into the ways of The Deal.<ref name="AE" />

As their minds developed, the young Stonesingers lost their fluidity, and had to choose a particular form. Since the Vaathkree had been active in the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] for several millennia, this was usually a [[Human/Legends|Human]]-sized [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] form. Others chose variant forms suited to their chosen professions.<ref name="AE" /> Stonesingers became adult Vaathkree at about twenty years of age.

==Society and culture==
Concepts such as barter, haggling, sales technique, and supply and demand were deeply ingrained in Vaathkree culture. As a result, they were one of the most renowned trading species in the [[Galaxy/Legends|galaxy]]. A trade route, the [[Vaathkree Trade Corridor/Legends|Vaathkree Trade Corridor]], was named after them. Over time, the Vaathkree had developed a complicated trade language for discussing business matters. Non-Vaathkree found this language especially hard to decipher, which usually worked in the Vaathkree's favor.

The Vaathkree also invented a two-dimensional artform known as [[Flatsculp/Legends|flatsculp]], similar in style to [[Paonidd extrassa art]].<ref name="HttE">''[[Heir to the Empire]]''</ref>

==History==
[[File:Valka.jpg|thumb|right|200px|[[Valka]], a Vaathkree from the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]]]]
At some point, Vaathkree traders discovered the [[Houk/Legends|Houk]] which lead that race to begin to colonize other planets.<ref name="GG12">''[[Galaxy Guide 12: Aliens — Enemies and Allies]]''</ref>

==Vaathkree in the galaxy==
Notable Vaathkree in the galaxy included [[Valka]], employed by the [[Herglic/Legends|Herglic]] [[Hamar-Chaktak]] as a henchman, and [[Grosteek]], the proprietor of the [[Farrimmer Cafe]] onboard [[Mynock 7 Space Station]].
